Playwright MCP covered visible UI input, browser-rendered response text, Performance API resource timing, console cleanliness, and durable screenshot evidence.
Vercel production, Cloud Run health, GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel usage, and Cloud Run free-tier guardrails were all healthy.
The CPU Top-3 values in the AI answer matched the dashboard slot values and the follow-up preserved the exact IDs and percentages.
